data.title: Ardelyx to report EPS of $-0.13, analysts expect positive guidance. Past misses led to stock drops. Shares down 25.3% in 52-week period.
data.description: Ardelyx (NASDAQ: ARDX) is set to announce its quarterly earnings, with analysts predicting an EPS of $-0.13. In the last earnings release, the company missed EPS by $0.09, causing a 24.5% drop in share price. As of July 31, Ardelyx's stock was trading at $4.24, down 25.3% over the last 52 weeks. Market sentiment is generally negative, with long-term shareholders likely bearish. Analysts rate Ardelyx as a Buy, with an average one-year price target of $10.00. The upcoming earnings report will be crucial for investors, who will be looking for positive guidance and future growth forecasts from the company.

data.title: Amgen declares $2.38 per share dividend for Q3 of 2025, to be paid on Sept 12.
data.description: Amgen, headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California, released news on August 1, 2025, declaring a dividend of $2.38 per share for the third quarter of 2025. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on September 12, 2025, to shareholders of record at the end of business hours.

data.title: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust declares $0.10417/share distribution, payable on Aug 20, 2025 to shareholders of record by Aug 11.
data.description: A Trust named Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) based in Santa Fe, N.M., revealed the upcoming monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share for its common shareholders. The payment is scheduled for August 20, 2025, and will apply to shareholders of record as of August 11.

data.title: Shore Bancshares, Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on August 25, 2025 to stockholders on record.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Easton-based Shore Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHBI) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend for common stockholders. The dividend stands at $0.12 per share and is slated to be distributed on August 25, 2025. Shareholders recorded as of August 11, 2025 will be eligible to receive the dividend. Shore Bancshares continues to demonstrate financial stability and commitment to providing returns to its investors through this dividend declaration.

data.title: Trump demands firings after July's abysmal job report, showing only 73,000 jobs, down from previous months.
data.description: In July, the monthly jobs report revealed a mere 73,000 jobs, indicating significant decreases in the figures reported for May and June.

data.title: Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. reported a net income of $678,000 for Q2 2025 - net income for the first half is $1.3 million.
data.description: In Mineola, Texas, on August 1, 2025, Texas Community Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBS), the parent company of Broadstreet Bank, SSB, announced a net income of $678,000 for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The total net income for the company for that period amounted to $1.3 million.

data.title: Tether Gold (XAUt) market cap exceeds $800 million as institutions bolster BTC holdings amidst record high physical gold prices.
data.description: With gold prices peaking, the market capitalization of Tether Gold (XAUt) has exceeded $800 million. At the same time, Twenty One Capital, a Bitcoin treasury firm, is enlarging its holdings.

data.title: Tevogen CEO highlights growth, capital, and AI expansion in letter to stockholders. Stock ticker: TVGN.
data.description: A press release dated August 1, 2025, from Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. based in Warren, N.J., was issued via Globe Newswire. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TVGN, shared a letter addressed to its stockholders.

data.title: AmeriCorps funding cuts jeopardize National Mental Health Corps pipeline, impacting crisis call center placements.
data.description: In Newtown, Connecticut on August 1, 2025, the National Mental Health Corps (NMHC) faces uncertainty with potential repercussions for the mental health workforce. As a primary source for mental health professionals, NMHC is at risk due to the discontinuation of AmeriCorps funding for crisis call center placements. This loss comes at a critical time amidst a rising mental health crisis, with approximately X crisis calls being handled per month. The future of X individuals relying on mental health services through NMHC hangs in the balance, emphasizing the urgent need for funding support in this sector.

data.title: Bitcoin whale from 2009 moves millions of BTC. Analysts warn of potential correction due to long-term holders selling.
data.description: According to analysts at CryptoQuant, the selling pressure from long-term holders has the potential to trigger a significant correction lasting for several months.

data.title: HK Monetary Authority plans to reopen 10-year RMB bonds in August 2025, offering RMB1.5 billion to primary dealers in a tender.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has announced a tender for the re-opening of 10-year RMB HKSAR Institutional Government Bonds. They are offering RMB1.5 billion to primary dealers to participate in this tender. This initiative aims to further strengthen the financial market in Hong Kong and promote investment opportunities in the region.

data.title: OpenAI secures $8.3 billion, now valued at $300 billion; funding round oversubscribed 5x amid high AI investor interest.
data.description: The recent funding round for OpenAI was in high demand among investors, being five times oversubscribed. This surge in interest reflects the growing enthusiasm for AI technology. The company's valuation now stands at $300 billion, a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: Pho Hoa Cypress opens in Cypress, California on Aug 2 & 3, 2025, featuring a diverse pho menu.
data.description: A new Pho Hoa restaurant has recently opened in Cypress, California on August 1, 2025. Offering a fresh and unique pho menu, this location aims to cater to both loyal pho enthusiasts and newcomers to the cuisine. The grand opening comes after the success of previous launches, showcasing the company's commitment to expanding its presence.
